name: Pon Pon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach or steam chicken over medium heat for approximately 10-12 minutes until done. Remove and let cool.
2. Shred or cut into match size strips.
3. Peel and cut cucumbers lengthwise into half, then slice into thin strips.
4. Mix with salt in a large bowl and squeeze gently for a minute to remove excess moisture. Drain well and place evenly on a platter.
5. In a saucepan, add dressing mixture and bring to a slow boil while stirring. Add stock or water if needed until slightly thickens.
6. Transfer dressing to a container and store until ready to serve.
7. To serve, place chicken strips on top of pickled cucumber and pour dressing over top.
